case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. YUQI WABG

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WABG, YUQI

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT WABG, YUQI DOES I TO V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WABG, YUQI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WABG, YUQI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1190 MISSION STREET, UNIT #2218 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
